docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF GARCIA, JUANA ANTONIA CHAVEZ AS TO DEFENDANT GREGORI, GINA MARIE ,AN INDIVIDUAL DBA APEX JANITORIAL SOLUTIONS JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
